items.title: Latvia stuns the U.S. 4-2 at ice hockey worlds
items.summary: Sandis Vilmanis scored two empty-net goals to help Latvia upset the United States 4-2 on Saturday at the ice hockey world championship in Zurich.

items.title: Giuliani: Congo must isolate or risk WC entry
items.summary: The Congo team must isolate for 21 days or risk the ability to enter the U.S. for the World Cup as the country deals with an outbreak of Ebola, Andrew Giuliani told ESPN on Friday.

items.title: North Korean side lift Asian Women's CL trophy
